articles.title: Odisha Heatwave To Get Worse From April 23; Temperature To Rise By 4 Degrees! - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Odisha has turned into a furnace! With Jharsuguda recording a massive 44.4°C by 2:30 PM today, the IMD warns that the worst is yet to come as temperatures are set to rise by another 4 degrees!
In this breaking weather update, we bring you the latest reports from the IMD. While Western Odisha is literally burning with Sambalpur and Hirakud crossing 43°C, Coastal Odisha is suffocating under extreme humidity (Guluguli) despite temperatures being around 40°C. From "Warm Night" warnings for Sundargarh and Bolangir to "Yellow Alerts" for 11 coastal districts including Bhubaneswar, Cuttack, and Puri—we have the full list.
#OdishaHeatwave #JharsugudaHeat #BhubaneswarWeather #IMDAlert #OdishaNews #Summer2026 #HeatwaveWarning #OdishaWeatherUpdate #WesternOdisha #CoastalOdisha #BreakingNews #WeatherAlert #StaySafeOdisha #KanakNewsStyle #OdishaBoiling

articles.title: Severe Heatwave Grips Odisha; Western Districts Cross 42°C, Is Your City On The List? - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Odisha is literally turning into a furnace! While Western Odisha is burning under a scorching sun, the Coastal belt is struggling with life-threatening humidity (Guluguli).
In this breaking weather update, we bring you the latest temperature readings from every corner of the state. From the record-breaking heat in Jharsuguda and Sambalpur to the unbearable sweating conditions in Bhubaneswar and Cuttack—we have the full list. Watch the full report to know the IMD's latest warning and find out how hot your city is today.
